header: We were tired of rebuilding the same components for every TYPO3 project
lead: Every new site meant the same heroes, cards, and pricing tables — rebuilt from scratch, styled slightly differently, audited never. We decided to fix that once, for everyone.
body: We believe TYPO3 editors deserve shadcn-quality UI. So we built Desiderio: 255 content elements in 10 groups, 49 Fluid 5 components, and 15 theme presets that repaint a whole site at runtime — dark mode included, no rebuilds ever. The core is GPL-licensed and free forever, because the TYPO3 community gave us our start. The same team now installs, hosts, and adapts Desiderio for teams who want it done by the people who built it.
